title: Sean 'Diddy' Combs sells $55 million Miami mansion he used as bail collateral in sex trafficking case
summary_full: Sean Combs sold a Miami mansion for fifty-five million dollars. This waterfront property was previously offered as bail collateral. Homeland Security agents had searched the estate during an investigation. Combs was convicted on two counts and sentenced to prison. He is currently serving his sentence while his appeal is pending.
